name: Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia
nameZh: 共濟失調評估與評分量表
developer: Schmitz-Hübsch、Klockgether 等（德國 Bonn 大學 / EUROSCA 聯盟）
measures: 8 項（步態、站姿、坐姿、語言、指鼻、指追、快速輪替、跟-脛），總分 0–40，分數越高越差；平均施測約 14 分鐘。
development: 於 167 + 119 名 SCA 病人兩組同時開發並驗證。
validation: 評分者間信度 ICC 0.98、再測 0.90、內部一致性 α 0.94，與整體評估高度線性相關。
useInTrials: SCA 領域事實上的黃金標準主要終點。仲恩 Stemchymal Ph1/2a（NCT01649687，北榮，收案 SARA 10–20）與 Ph2（NCT02540655，台日跨國，收案 SARA ≥9）皆以 SARA／fSARA 為療效指標。
taiwan: 台灣臨床與研究廣泛使用（北榮 Soong Bing-Wen 團隊 199 名 SCA 五年縱貫世代即以 SARA 追蹤）。註：公開來源未見台灣本地發表的中文版 SARA 心理計量驗證，已知中文版驗證出自中國大陸——台灣屬直接沿用，非另立台灣常模。

sources.label: 台灣榮總 SARA 縱貫世代 2019

en.developer: Schmitz-Hübsch, Klockgether et al. (Univ. of Bonn, Germany / EUROSCA consortium)
en.measures: 8 items (gait, stance, sitting, speech, finger-chase, nose-finger, fast alternating hand movements, heel-shin); total 0–40, higher = worse; ~14 min to administer.
en.development: Developed and validated simultaneously in two SCA cohorts of 167 + 119 patients.
en.validation: Inter-rater ICC 0.98, test-retest 0.90, internal consistency α 0.94; highly linear with global assessment.
en.useInTrials: The de facto gold-standard primary endpoint in SCA. Steminent's Stemchymal Ph1/2a (NCT01649687, Taipei VGH, enrolled SARA 10–20) and Ph2 (NCT02540655, Taiwan–Japan, enrolled SARA ≥9) both use SARA/f-SARA as efficacy measures.
en.taiwan: Widely used in Taiwan clinical practice and research (Taipei VGH Soong Bing-Wen's 199-patient 5-year SCA cohort tracked with SARA). Note: no Taiwan-local psychometric validation of a Chinese SARA is published; the known Chinese-version validation is from mainland China — Taiwan uses it directly rather than establishing a local norm.

name: modified functional Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia
nameZh: 功能性 SARA（4 項簡化版）
developer: Biohaven 主導改編；心理計量驗證 Potashman、Schmahmann 等（Cerebellum 2024）
measures: 取 SARA 的 4 個功能項目（步態、站姿、坐姿、語言），每項 0–4、總分 0–16，分數越高越差。
development: 為藥物試驗端點重新定義計分錨點的簡化版。
validation: 以 MGH 世代（n=33）與 troriluzole Ph3（NCT03701399，n=217，含 SCA3 n=89）驗證；內部一致性 α 0.90、再測 ICC 0.91。
useInTrials: Biohaven troriluzole Ph3 主要終點；仲恩 Stemchymal Ph2 亦報告 fSARA 穩定化結果。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證或常模；台灣經由仲恩 Ph2（台日跨國）實際使用。

en.developer: Adapted under Biohaven; psychometric validation Potashman, Schmahmann et al. (Cerebellum 2024)
en.measures: The 4 functional SARA items (gait, stance, sitting, speech), each 0–4, total 0–16, higher = worse.
en.development: A simplified version with re-defined scoring anchors for use as a drug-trial endpoint.
en.validation: Validated in the MGH cohort (n=33) and the troriluzole Ph3 (NCT03701399, n=217, incl. SCA3 n=89); internal consistency α 0.90, test-retest ICC 0.91.
en.useInTrials: Primary endpoint of Biohaven's troriluzole Ph3; Steminent's Stemchymal Ph2 also reports fSARA stabilization.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation/norm in public sources; used in Taiwan via Steminent's Ph2 (Taiwan–Japan).

name: International Cooperative Ataxia Rating Scale
nameZh: 國際合作共濟失調評分量表
developer: Trouillas 等（法國里昂 / 世界神經學聯盟 WFN 共濟失調神經藥理委員會）
measures: 19 項、總分 0–100，分 4 個次量表：姿勢與步態、肢體共濟失調、構音障礙、動眼障礙。
development: 為多中心國際化雙盲藥物試驗設計的半量化標準工具。
validation: 信效度廣泛驗證；後續研究指其項目有冗餘/共線性，促成 SARA 與 BARS 的誕生。
useInTrials: SARA 問世前的主流終點，現多作為 SARA 收斂效度的對照。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣本地中文版驗證（已知有韓文版）；台灣早期研究/臨床有使用紀錄，但無獨立台灣常模。

sources.label: 原始論文 J Neurol Sci 1997

en.developer: Trouillas et al. (Lyon, France / WFN Committee on Ataxia Neuropharmacology)
en.measures: 19 items, total 0–100, in 4 subscales: posture & gait, limb ataxia, dysarthria, oculomotor disorders.
en.development: Designed as a semi-quantitative standard tool for multicenter international double-blind drug trials.
en.validation: Reliability/validity widely established; later studies noted item redundancy/collinearity, prompting SARA and BARS.
en.useInTrials: The mainstream endpoint before SARA; now mostly used as a convergent-validity comparator for SARA.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-local Chinese validation in public sources (a Korean version exists); used in early Taiwan research/clinical practice but no independent Taiwan norm.

name: Spinocerebellar Ataxia Functional Index
nameZh: 脊髓小腦共濟失調功能指數
developer: Schmitz-Hübsch、Giunti、Klockgether 等（德國 Bonn / EUROSCA 多中心）
measures: 3 項客觀計時/計數測驗的複合 Z 分數：8 公尺步行計時（8MW）、9 孔插棒（9HPT）、10 秒內重複「PATA」音節次數。
development: 於 412 名 SCA1/2/3/6 病人多中心試驗中，將三項次測驗轉為 Z 分數組成複合指數。
validation: 與 SARA、功能量表、病程的相關性優於單一次測驗（r = −0.44 至 −0.87）。
useInTrials: SCA 試驗客觀次要終點，常與 SARA 併用。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證/常模。

en.developer: Schmitz-Hübsch, Giunti, Klockgether et al. (Bonn, Germany / EUROSCA multicenter)
en.measures: Composite Z-score of 3 objective timed/counted tests: 8-metre timed walk (8MW), 9-hole peg test (9HPT), and number of 'PATA' syllable repetitions in 10 s.
en.development: Derived by converting the three subtests to Z-scores forming a composite index in a 412-patient SCA1/2/3/6 multicenter study.
en.validation: Correlates with SARA, functional scales and disease course better than any single subtest (r = −0.44 to −0.87).
en.useInTrials: An objective secondary endpoint in SCA trials, often used alongside SARA.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation/norm in public sources.

name: Inventory of Non-Ataxia Signs
nameZh: 非共濟失調體徵盤查表
developer: Jacobi、Rakowicz 等（EUROSCA 聯盟；德國 Bonn 團隊）
measures: 標準化盤查伴隨 SCA 的非共濟失調體徵（反射異常、錐體束徵、痙攣、肌萎縮、肌陣攣、肌張力不全、感覺異常、動眼徵、認知障礙等），以出現的體徵類別數計「INAS count」。
development: 140 名測評估者間信度、28 名測評估者內信度，並用 EUROSCA 自然史資料測反應性與效度。
validation: count 與多數單項的評估者間與再測信度皆高。
useInTrials: 自然史（EUROSCA）與試驗中描述非共濟失調負擔的輔助工具，非主要療效終點。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證/常模。

en.developer: Jacobi, Rakowicz et al. (EUROSCA consortium; Bonn, Germany)
en.measures: Standardized inventory of non-ataxia signs accompanying SCA (reflex abnormalities, pyramidal signs, spasticity, muscle atrophy, myoclonus, dystonia, sensory deficits, oculomotor signs, cognitive impairment, etc.), summarized as an 'INAS count' of sign categories present.
en.development: Inter-rater reliability tested in 140 patients, intra-rater in 28, plus responsiveness/validity using EUROSCA natural-history data.
en.validation: The count and most individual items show high inter-rater and test-retest reliability.
en.useInTrials: An adjunct for describing non-ataxia burden in natural history (EUROSCA) and trials, not a primary efficacy endpoint.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation/norm in public sources.

name: Brief Ataxia Rating Scale
nameZh: 簡明共濟失調評分量表
developer: Schmahmann、Gardner、MacMore、Vangel（美國麻省總醫院 MGH / 哈佛）
development: 先擴充 ICARS 為 MICARS，再統計選出與總分最相關的 5 項子集，供快速施測。
validation: 評估者間信度 ICC 0.91（Mov Disord 2009）。
useInTrials: 門診/一般神經科快速評估與部分研究使用；藥物試驗較少作主要終點。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證/常模。

en.developer: Schmahmann, Gardner, MacMore, Vangel (Massachusetts General Hospital / Harvard, USA)
en.measures: 5 items, total 0–30: gait (0–8), knee-shin (each side 0–4), finger-nose (each side 0–4), dysarthria (0–4), oculomotor (0–2).
en.development: First expanded ICARS into MICARS, then statistically selected the 5 items most correlated with the total for rapid administration.
en.useInTrials: Used for rapid assessment in clinic/general neurology and some research; less common as a primary drug-trial endpoint.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation/norm in public sources.

name: Composite Cerebellar Functional Severity Score
nameZh: 複合小腦功能嚴重度分數
developer: Tezenas du Montcel、Dürr 等（法國巴黎 Pitié-Salpêtrière / SPATAX）
measures: 兩項上肢客觀測驗的複合對數分數：9 孔插棒 + 點擊測驗（優勢手，依年齡校正），施測約 5 分鐘。
development: 於 123 對照、141 ADCA、53 ADSP 病人中驗證；迴歸顯示兩項即可解釋小腦功能障礙嚴重度。
validation: ADCA 病人分數顯著差於對照與 ADSP；SCA1/2/3 次群可區分。（精確計算公式建議回 Brain 2008 原文核對常數）
useInTrials: 流病研究、試驗與追蹤的上肢客觀指標。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證/常模。

en.developer: Tezenas du Montcel, Dürr et al. (Pitié-Salpêtrière, Paris, France / SPATAX)
en.measures: Composite log score of two objective upper-limb tests: 9-hole peg test + click test (dominant hand, age-adjusted); ~5 min to administer.
en.development: Validated in 123 controls, 141 ADCA and 53 ADSP patients; regression showed two tests suffice to explain cerebellar-dysfunction severity.
en.validation: ADCA patients score significantly worse than controls and ADSP; distinguishes SCA1/2/3 subgroups. (Verify exact scoring constants against the Brain 2008 original.)
en.useInTrials: An objective upper-limb measure in epidemiology, trials and follow-up.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation/norm in public sources.

name: Patient-Reported Outcome Measure of Ataxia
nameZh: 共濟失調病人自陳結果量表
developer: Schmahmann 等（美國 MGH / 哈佛）
measures: 70 題問卷，源自病人經驗，涵蓋身體、日常活動、認知/情緒等面向，0–4 Likert 計分。
development: 首個由病人主導建構的共濟失調症狀清單。
validation: 原始論文為橫斷面驗證；後續研究進行縱貫與收斂效度驗證。
useInTrials: 已納入部分 SCA 自然史與試驗作病人自陳（PRO）端點，正翻譯多語版本。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣特定驗證；已知中文版驗證出自中國大陸（中山大學 2024），非台灣。

en.measures: 70-item questionnaire derived from patient experience, covering physical, activities-of-daily-living, and cognitive/affective domains, scored 0–4 Likert.
en.development: The first patient-led symptom inventory in ataxia.
en.validation: Original paper cross-sectional; subsequent work adds longitudinal and convergent validity (Burt 2025 showed measurable progression in SCA).
en.useInTrials: Incorporated into some SCA natural-history studies and trials as a patient-reported (PRO) endpoint; being translated into multiple languages.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-specific validation in public sources; the known Chinese-version validation is from mainland China (Sun Yat-sen Univ. 2024), not Taiwan.

name: EuroQol 5-Dimension (EQ-5D-3L)
developer: EuroQol Group（歐洲多國聯盟）；SCA 專屬驗證 Cerebellum 2023（n=842）
measures: 通用型健康相關生活品質（HRQoL）／健康效用量表：5 面向（行動、自我照顧、日常活動、疼痛/不適、焦慮/憂鬱）＋ EQ-VAS 自評健康 0–100。
development: 非 SCA 專屬的通用效用量表，可換算成 QALY 供衛生經濟評估。
validation: SCA 專屬驗證（n=842 歐洲 SCA1/2/3/6，兩個縱貫世代）：EQ-5D-3L ICC 0.95、EQ-VAS ICC 0.88，可依年齡、SARA、ADL、INAS 區分族群。
useInTrials: SCA 試驗與世代研究常用的生活品質/健康效用次要終點；量的是病人主觀健康，非運動失調嚴重度本身。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣 SCA 專屬 EQ-5D 驗證；台灣有通用中文版 EQ-5D 可沿用。

en.developer: EuroQol Group (European consortium); SCA-specific validation Cerebellum 2023 (n=842)
en.measures: Generic health-related quality-of-life (HRQoL) / health-utility measure: 5 dimensions (mobility, self-care, usual activities, pain/discomfort, anxiety/depression) + EQ-VAS self-rated health 0–100.
en.development: A generic, non-SCA-specific utility measure convertible to QALYs for health-economic evaluation.
en.validation: SCA-specific validation (n=842 European SCA1/2/3/6, two longitudinal cohorts): EQ-5D-3L ICC 0.95, EQ-VAS ICC 0.88; discriminates by age, SARA, ADL and INAS.
en.useInTrials: A common quality-of-life / health-utility secondary endpoint in SCA trials and cohorts; captures patient-perceived health rather than ataxia severity itself.
en.taiwan: No SCA-specific EQ-5D validation for Taiwan in public sources; a generic Chinese EQ-5D is available for use.

name: 36-Item Short Form Health Survey (SF-36)
developer: Ware、Sherbourne（美國 RAND / Medical Outcomes Study）
measures: 通用型 HRQoL：8 個面向（生理功能、生理角色、身體疼痛、一般健康、活力、社會功能、情緒角色、心理健康），彙整成生理(PCS)與心理(MCS) summary。
development: 非 SCA 專屬的通用健康調查，跨疾病可比。
validation: SCA 使用實例：一項 80 名 SCA 病人研究以 SF-36 評 HRQoL，發現有無照顧者是自覺生活品質的決定因子。
useInTrials: 作為 SCA 生活品質面向的描述性/次要指標；量的是主觀健康與功能，非運動失調嚴重度。
taiwan: 台灣有本地驗證的繁體中文版 SF-36（一般族群）可沿用；SCA 專屬台灣驗證未見。

en.developer: Ware, Sherbourne (RAND / Medical Outcomes Study, USA)
en.measures: Generic HRQoL: 8 domains (physical functioning, role-physical, bodily pain, general health, vitality, social functioning, role-emotional, mental health), aggregated into physical (PCS) and mental (MCS) summaries.
en.development: A generic, non-SCA-specific health survey, comparable across diseases.
en.validation: SCA use example: a study of 80 SCA patients assessed HRQoL with SF-36 and found the presence of a carer to be a determinant of self-perceived quality of life.
en.useInTrials: A descriptive/secondary quality-of-life measure in SCA; captures subjective health and function, not ataxia severity.
en.taiwan: A locally validated Traditional-Chinese SF-36 (general population) is available for use in Taiwan; no SCA-specific Taiwan validation found.

sources.label: SF-36 於 SCA 之 HRQoL 研究 (Neurología)

name: Wearable-sensor gait & digital-motor biomarkers
nameZh: 穿戴式感測器步態／數位運動生物標記
developer: Ilg 等（德國 Tübingen）為代表團隊；另有多中心穿戴感測研究
measures: 以慣性感測器量步態指標（如 toe-off angle 及其變異度、步速、步幅、複合步態指標）。
development: 於 SCA3 等病人以家用/實驗室穿戴感測器擷取自然步態（此領域仍在發展）。
validation: 1 年縱貫變化的效應量高於 SARA；早期病程對變化更敏感。樣本量估算：偵測 1 年 50% 病程減緩，數位步態指標約需 n≈42，SARA（2 年）需 n≈147。
useInTrials: 新興客觀/次要終點與試驗豐富化工具，尚非法規核可的主要終點。
taiwan: 公開來源未見台灣主導的 SCA 數位步態驗證研究（需查證）。

sources.label: 數位步態 SCA3 Mov Disord 2022
穿戴感測 SCA 步態平衡 2021

en.developer: Ilg et al. (Tübingen, Germany) as a representative group; plus multicenter wearable-sensor studies
en.measures: Inertial-sensor gait metrics (e.g. toe-off angle and its variability, gait speed, stride length, composite gait indices).
en.development: Captures natural gait via home/lab wearable sensors in SCA3 and others (a field still maturing).
en.validation: Effect size of 1-year longitudinal change exceeds SARA; more sensitive in early disease. Sample-size: to detect a 50% slowing of 1-year progression, digital gait needs ~n≈42 vs SARA (2-yr) ~n≈147.
en.useInTrials: An emerging objective/secondary endpoint and trial-enrichment tool, not yet a regulatory-accepted primary endpoint.
en.taiwan: No Taiwan-led SCA digital-gait validation study found in public sources (to be verified).

sources.label: Digital gait in SCA3, Mov Disord 2022
Wearable sensing of gait and balance in SCA, 2021
